resources.string: Use LEFT/RIGHT to rotate the circle. Collect stars and avoid spikes. Don\'t let the ball escape!

• Use D-PAD to move the snake.
• Eat red apples to grow and score.
• Don't hit walls or yourself!
• Press 'S' or MUTE to toggle sound.
• Press CENTER to pause.

• Use D-PAD to move the cursor.
• Press CENTER to reveal a cell.
• Press MENU or 'S' to flag a mine.
• Clear all safe cells to win.
• First move is always safe!

• Use D-PAD to slide tiles.
• Tiles with same numbers merge.
• Reach the 4096 tile to win!
• Game ends when the board is full.
• Press CENTER to restart if stuck.

• Press UP or CENTER to jump.
• Avoid the cacti and birds!
• The game gets faster over time.
• Press DOWN to duck (if implemented).
• Try to beat your high score!

• Move paddle with LEFT/RIGHT.
• Press CENTER to launch ball or pause.
• Break all bricks to clear the stage.
• You have 3 lives. Don't let the ball fall.
• Press 'S' or MUTE to toggle sound.

• Move cursor with D-PAD.
• Press CENTER to place X.
• Beat the CPU by matching a row.
• Turn alternates each match.
• Change Board Size (3x3, 4x4, 5x5)
 with UP/DOWN when Game Over
 or press MENU any time.

• D-PAD: move cursor. CENTER: select square, then destination.
• Red (you) moves up; CPU moves down. Dark squares only.
• Captures are mandatory when possible; finish multi-jumps on the same piece (magenta outline).
• Reach the far row to crown a king (K); kings slide and capture on all diagonals.
• Clear all CPU pieces or block their moves to win.

• D-PAD: move. Push boxes ($) onto targets (cyan rings); on-target shows as *.
• Only one box at a time; you cannot pull.
• CENTER: restart current level if stuck.
• When a level is solved, CENTER advances. Clear all levels for a high score.

• D-PAD: move cell. CENTER: cycle value 0 (clear) through 9 on empty cells.
• Given numbers (white) are locked.
• No repeats in any row, column, or 3×3 box; conflicts tint red.
• When the grid is complete and valid, CENTER loads the next puzzle.

• Move piece with LEFT/RIGHT.
• Rotate with UP.
• Soft drop with DOWN.
• Hard drop with CENTER.
• Press H or INFO to pause/guide.

• Move ship with D-PAD.
• Triple lasers fire automatically.
• Destroy enemies to score.
• Collect green power-ups to upgrade weapons (5, 7 guns).
• Avoid enemy ships and red bullets!
• Press 'S' to toggle sound.

• Navigate with DPAD.
• Flip card with CENTER.
• Match all pairs to win.
• Fewer moves is better!

• Use DPAD to move cursor.
• Press CENTER to slide tile.
• Reorder pieces to form picture.
• Numbers show correct order.

• Study the maze carefully.
• Find which exit (image) is connected to the green dot.
• Use LEFT/RIGHT to select.
• Press CENTER to confirm.
• One chance per stage!

• Solve the math problem.
• Use DPAD to select answer.
• Press CENTER to confirm.
• Be quick! Timer is running.
• Wrong answer ends game.

• Cross the road and river.
• Avoid cars on the road.
• Jump on logs in the river.
• Reach the top to score!
• Use D-PAD to move.

• Watch the sequence of colors.
• Repeat it using the D-PAD:
 - UP: Yellow
 - RIGHT: Green
 - DOWN: Red
 - LEFT: Blue
• Sequence gets longer each round!

• Control your tank with D-PAD.
• Tank fires automatically.
• Destroy enemy tanks.
• Protect your BASE (the star).
• Bricks can be destroyed.

• Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries.
• Use D-PAD to navigate keyboard.
• Press CENTER to select letter.
• GREEN: Correct letter & position.
• YELLOW: Correct letter, wrong position.
• GRAY: Letter not in word.

• Navigate the dungeon with D-PAD.
• Collect the GOLDEN KEY.
• Reach the EXIT DOOR to advance.
• AVOID RED SPIKES at all costs!
• Levels get harder with more obstacles.

• Press CENTER to flap your wings.
• Fly through the gaps in the pipes.
• Don't touch the pipes or the ground!
• Score 1 point for every pipe cleared.
• Test your reflexes!

• Use D-PAD to move the cursor.
• Press CENTER to select a ball, then press CENTER on an empty cell to move it.
• Align 5 or more balls of the same color (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) to score and clear them.
• Each move that doesn't clear lines adds 3 new balls.
• Game ends when the board is full.
• Press 'S' or MUTE to toggle sound.

• Use D-PAD to move the cursor.
• Press CENTER to select/pick up cards, and CENTER to place them.
• Build foundations by suit from Ace to King.
• Build tableaus by alternating color and descending rank.
• Press 'S' or MUTE to toggle sound.
• Move Left/Right to avoid traffic.\n• Survive as long as you can!\n• Press Center to Start/Pause.
• Select letters to guess the word.\n• You have 6 attempts.\n• Press Center to Guess.
DpadHero: Select a game with D-Pad
Enable or disable in-game sound effects.
